name: Wraynman

sheet.name: Wraynman
sheet.background_story: Wraynman's story plays out like a scratched '90s CD.  His parents abandoned him before his third birthday leaving him with only a magical bow and a well loved copy of Shrek 2 on DVD.  As he grew older he begin to feel an unexplained power within him, more subtle than a subliminal message in a Tool song.  His bow would often glow an eerie light, humming like a dial-up modem, which, according to the wise elders was a sign of latent magical abilities passed down to him.

description: Wraynman's story plays out like a scratched '90s CD.  His parents abandoned him before his third birthday leaving him with only a magical bow and a well loved copy of Shrek 2 on DVD.  As he grew older he begin to feel an unexplained power within him, more subtle than a subliminal message in a Tool song.  His bow would often glow an eerie light, humming like a dial-up modem, which, according to the wise elders was a sign of latent magical abilities passed down to him.
